```{r}
############################################################
# Combine 2021-2023 and API 2024+ EDM Data
# Project: Sewage
# Date: 2025-04-07
# Author: Jacopo Olivieri
############################################################

#' Reads, harmonizes, and combines the processed historical EDM data (2021-2023)
#' with the processed API-sourced EDM data (2024 onwards) into a single
#' consolidated Parquet file for analysis.

# Setup Functions
############################################################

#' Initialize the R environment with required packages
#' @return NULL
initialise_environment <- function() {
  if (!requireNamespace("renv", quietly = TRUE)) {
    install.packages("renv")
  }

  # Define required packages
  required_packages <- c(
    "here", "fs", "arrow", "dplyr", "purrr",
    "logger", "glue", "lubridate", "janitor"
  )

  # Install and load packages
  install_if_missing <- function(packages) {
    new_packages <- packages[!sapply(packages, requireNamespace, quietly = TRUE)]
    if (length(new_packages) > 0) {
      message(
        "Installing missing packages: ",
        paste(new_packages, collapse = ", ")
      )
      install.packages(new_packages)
    }
    invisible(sapply(packages, library, character.only = TRUE))
  }

  install_if_missing(required_packages)
}

#' Configure logging for the script
#' @return NULL
setup_logging <- function() {
  log_dir <- here::here("output", "log")
  fs::dir_create(log_dir, recurse = TRUE)
  log_path <- file.path(log_dir, "07_combine_historical_and_api_data.log")

  logger::log_appender(logger::appender_file(log_path))
  logger::log_layout(logger::layout_glue_colors)
  logger::log_threshold(logger::INFO)
  logger::log_info("Script started at {Sys.time()}")
}

# Configuration
############################################################

CONFIG <- list(
  historical_data_file = here::here("data", "processed", "combined_edm_data.parquet"),
  api_data_file = here::here("data", "processed", "edm_api_data", "combined_api_data.parquet"),
  output_file = here::here("data", "processed", "combined_edm_data.parquet"),
  final_columns = c(
    "water_company", "year", 
    "site_name_ea", "unique_id", 
    "start_time", "end_time", "site_name_wa_sc", 
    "latitude", "longitude",
    "receiving_water_course", "data_source"
  )
)

# Data Processing Functions
############################################################

#' Reads a source Parquet file and adds a data source identifier.
#' @param file_path Path to the input Parquet file.
#' @param source_name Character string identifying the data source (e.g., "Historical", "API").
#' @return A tibble with the loaded data and an added 'data_source' column, or NULL on error.
read_source_data <- function(file_path, source_name) {
  logger::log_info("Reading {source_name} data from: {file_path}")
  if (!fs::file_exists(file_path)) {
    logger::log_error("{source_name} data file not found: {file_path}")
    return(NULL)
  }

  tryCatch(
    {
      df <- arrow::read_parquet(file_path) %>%
        dplyr::mutate(data_source = source_name)
      logger::log_info("Successfully read {nrow(df)} rows from {source_name} data.")
      return(df)
    },
    error = function(e) {
      logger::log_error("Error reading {source_name} data from {file_path}: {e$message}")
      return(NULL)
    }
  )
}

#' Harmonises columns of a dataframe to the target schema.
#' @param df The input dataframe (from either historical or API source).
#' @param source_name The name of the source ("Historical" or "API").
#' @return A tibble with harmonised columns according to CONFIG$final_columns, or NULL on error.
harmonise_columns <- function(df, source_name) {
  logger::log_info("Harmonising columns for {source_name} data.")
  if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) == 0) {
    logger::log_warn("Input data for harmonisation ({source_name}) is NULL or empty. Returning empty structure.")
    # Return an empty tibble with the correct structure
    return(
      dplyr::tibble(!!!setNames(rep(list(logical()), length(CONFIG$final_columns)), CONFIG$final_columns)) %>%
        dplyr::mutate(across(everything(), ~NA)) # Ensure correct types where possible or handle later
    )
  }

  tryCatch(
    {
      if (source_name == "Historical") {
        # Identify the best available ID column from candidates
        id_col_name <- NULL
        available_cols <- names(df)
        for (candidate in CONFIG$historical_id_candidates) {
          if (candidate %in% available_cols) {
            id_col_name <- candidate
            logger::log_info("Using '{id_col_name}' as unique_event_id for Historical data.")
            break
          }
        }
        if (is.null(id_col_name)) {
          logger::log_warn("No suitable unique ID column found in Historical data among candidates. Setting 'unique_event_id' to NA.")
          df <- df %>% dplyr::mutate(unique_event_id = NA_character_)
        } else {
          # Use !!sym() to correctly rename using the variable id_col_name
          df <- df %>% dplyr::rename(unique_event_id = !!rlang::sym(id_col_name))
        }


        harmonized_df <- df %>%
          # Ensure necessary columns exist, adding NAs if they don't
          # (site names should exist based on script 03)
          dplyr::mutate(
            latitude = NA_real_,
            longitude = NA_real_,
            receiving_water_course = NA_character_,
            # Ensure time columns are POSIXct UTC
            start_time = lubridate::with_tz(as.POSIXct(start_time), "UTC"),
            end_time = lubridate::with_tz(as.POSIXct(end_time), "UTC"),
            year = as.integer(year) # Should already exist
          ) %>%
          # Select final columns - use any_of to be safe
          dplyr::select(dplyr::any_of(CONFIG$final_columns))
      } else if (source_name == "API") {
        harmonized_df <- df %>%
          # Rename API's unique_id
          dplyr::rename(unique_event_id = unique_id) %>%
          # Ensure necessary columns exist, adding NAs if they don't
          dplyr::mutate(
            site_name_ea = NA_character_,
            site_name_wa_sc = NA_character_,
            # Derive year from start_time (should be POSIXct from script 06)
            year = lubridate::year(start_time),
            # Ensure time columns are POSIXct UTC (should be from script 06)
            start_time = lubridate::with_tz(as.POSIXct(start_time), "UTC"),
            end_time = lubridate::with_tz(as.POSIXct(end_time), "UTC")
          ) %>%
          # Select final columns - use any_of to be safe
          dplyr::select(dplyr::any_of(CONFIG$final_columns))
      } else {
        stop("Unknown source_name provided: ", source_name)
      }

      # Ensure all final columns are present, adding any missing ones as NA
      missing_cols <- setdiff(CONFIG$final_columns, names(harmonized_df))
      if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
        logger::log_warn("Adding missing columns for {source_name}: {paste(missing_cols, collapse=', ')}")
        for (col in missing_cols) {
          # Attempt to infer type, default to character
          default_val <- switch(col,
            year = NA_integer_,
            latitude = NA_real_,
            longitude = NA_real_,
            start_time = as.POSIXct(NA),
            end_time = as.POSIXct(NA),
            NA_character_
          )
          harmonized_df[[col]] <- default_val
        }
      }

      # Reorder columns to final specification
      harmonized_df <- harmonized_df %>%
        dplyr::select(all_of(CONFIG$final_columns))

      logger::log_info("Column harmonisation complete for {source_name} data.")
      return(harmonized_df)
    },
    error = function(e) {
      logger::log_error("Error harmonising columns for {source_name} data: {e$message}")
      return(NULL)
    }
  )
}

#' Combines two harmonized dataframes.
#' @param df1 First harmonized dataframe (e.g., historical).
#' @param df2 Second harmonized dataframe (e.g., API).
#' @return A single combined tibble, or NULL if inputs are invalid.
combine_data <- function(df1, df2) {
  logger::log_info("Combining historical and API data.")
  if (is.null(df1) || is.null(df2)) {
    logger::log_error("One or both input dataframes for combination are NULL.")
    return(NULL)
  }

  tryCatch(
    {
      # Ensure column types are compatible before binding - check major ones
      if (class(df1$start_time) != class(df2$start_time)) {
        logger::log_warn("Attempting to coerce start_time columns to POSIXct for binding.")
        df1$start_time <- as.POSIXct(df1$start_time)
        df2$start_time <- as.POSIXct(df2$start_time)
      }
      if (class(df1$end_time) != class(df2$end_time)) {
        logger::log_warn("Attempting to coerce end_time columns to POSIXct for binding.")
        df1$end_time <- as.POSIXct(df1$end_time)
        df2$end_time <- as.POSIXct(df2$end_time)
      }
      if (class(df1$year) != class(df2$year)) {
        logger::log_warn("Attempting to coerce year columns to integer for binding.")
        df1$year <- as.integer(df1$year)
        df2$year <- as.integer(df2$year)
      }


      combined_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(df1, df2)
      logger::log_info("Successfully combined data. Total rows: {nrow(combined_df)}")
      # Optional: Add checks for duplicates across the boundary if needed
      # combined_df <- combined_df %>% distinct()
      return(combined_df)
    },
    error = function(e) {
      logger::log_error("Error combining dataframes: {e$message}")
      return(NULL)
    }
  )
}

#' Writes the final combined data to a Parquet file.
#' @param df The combined dataframe.
#' @param output_path Path for the output Parquet file.
#' @return Logical TRUE for success, FALSE for failure.
write_output_data <- function(df, output_path) {
  logger::log_info("Writing final combined data to: {output_path}")
  if (is.null(df)) {
    logger::log_error("Cannot write output: Input dataframe is NULL.")
    return(FALSE)
  }
  if (nrow(df) == 0) {
    logger::log_warn("Input dataframe has 0 rows. Writing an empty Parquet file.")
  }


  tryCatch(
    {
      output_dir <- dirname(output_path)
      if (!fs::dir_exists(output_dir)) {
        logger::log_info("Creating output directory: {output_dir}")
        fs::dir_create(output_dir, recurse = TRUE)
      }
      arrow::write_parquet(df, output_path)
      logger::log_info("Successfully wrote {nrow(df)} rows to {output_path}.")
      return(TRUE)
    },
    error = function(e) {
      logger::log_error("Error writing output Parquet file to {output_path}: {e$message}")
      return(FALSE)
    }
  )
}

# Main Execution
############################################################

#' Main function to orchestrate the data combination process.
main <- function() {
  start_time <- Sys.time()

  # Setup
  initialise_environment()
  setup_logging()

  logger::log_info("===== Starting Historical and API EDM Data Combination =====")

  tryCatch(
    {
      # Read data
      historical_data <- read_source_data(CONFIG$historical_data_file, "Historical")
      api_data <- read_source_data(CONFIG$api_data_file, "API")

      # Harmonise data
      historical_harmonised <- harmonise_columns(historical_data, "Historical")
      api_harmonised <- harmonise_columns(api_data, "API")

      # Combine data
      combined_data <- combine_data(historical_harmonised, api_harmonised)

      # Write output
      if (!is.null(combined_data)) {
        write_success <- write_output_data(combined_data, CONFIG$output_file)
        if (!write_success) {
          stop("Failed to write the final combined Parquet file.")
        }
      } else {
        stop("Data combination failed. Cannot write output.")
      }

      logger::log_info("===== Data Combination Finished Successfully =====")
    },
    error = function(e) {
      logger::log_fatal("Fatal error during script execution: {e$message}")
      # Stop execution implicitly due to error
    },
    finally = {
      end_time <- Sys.time()
      duration <- end_time - start_time
      formatted_duration <- format(duration)
      logger::log_info("===== Script execution finished in {formatted_duration} =====")
      logger::log_info("Script finished at {Sys.time()}")
    }
  )
}

# Run main function if script is executed directly
if (sys.nframe() == 0) {
  main()
}
```

```{r}
api_data %>% 
  filter(water_company == "Anglian Water") %>% 
  arrange(start_time)

historical_data 
```

```{r}
data <- import(here("data", "processed", "combined_edm_data.parquet"))

data %>% 
  filter(data_source == "2024 onwards") %>% 
  filter(year == 2025)
  arrange(start_time) %>% 
  group_by(water_company) %>% 
  slice_head(n=6)

data_company  <- import(here("data", "processed", "edm_api_data", "united_utilities.parquet"))
```


```{r}
x21 <- load_data(2021)[[1]]
x22 <- load_data(2022)[[1]]
x23 <- load_data(2023)[[1]]
x24 <- load_data(2024)[[1]]

x21 %>% 
  lapply(clean_data)

process_year(2021)

year = 2024
load_data(year) %>%
  lapply(clean_data) %>%
  bind_rows() %>%
  mutate(year = year) %>% 
  pull(year_data_start) %>% unique()

for (i in seq(10)) {
  x24[[i]] %>%
  clean_data() %>% 
  pull(year_data_start) %>% unique() %>% print()
}
combined_data$year %>% unique()
```





  filter(water_company == "Anglian Water") %>% 
  arrange(start_time) %>% 
  select(water_company, year, site_name_ea, unique_event_id, start_time, end_time, site_name_wa_sc, latitude, longitude,
         receiving_water_course, data_source
